subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens near to the Most Glorious Beauty! Your radiant photographs were received and beheld. Praise be unto God for the illumination [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیزان مقربه جمال ابهی صور شعاایه شما رسید ملاحظه گردید الحمد لله نورانیت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
